name: ThreatStream
description: Integrates a variety of generic, reputation, and investigative actions from the Anomali ThreatStream threat intelligence platform

actions.name: File Reputation
actions.description: Get information about a file

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: Hash of file

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Total number of observables to return

parameters.name: extend_source
parameters.description: Fetch extra data from Anomali server if available

actions.name: Domain Reputation

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Domain to investigate

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Total number of observables to return

parameters.name: extend_source
parameters.description: Fetch extra data from Anomali server if available

parameters.name: pdns
parameters.description: If enabled, pdns will also be fetched

parameters.name: insights
parameters.description: If enabled, insights will also be fetched

parameters.name: external_references
parameters.description: If enabled, external references will also be fetched

parameters.name: search_exact_value
parameters.description: Search for the exact domain

parameters.description: ID number of incident to return

actions.name: Create Incident
actions.description: Create an incident in ThreatStream

parameters.name: local_intelligence
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of local intelligence IDs to associate with the incident - Note that this appends

parameters.name: cloud_intelligence
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of remote intelligence IDs to associate with the incident - Note that this appends

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name to give the incident

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: JSON formatted string of fields to include with the incident

parameters.name: is_public
parameters.description: Classification designation

parameters.name: create_on_cloud
parameters.description: Create on remote (cloud)? (applicable only for hybrid on-prem instances)

parameters.description: ID number of incident to update

parameters.name: allow_unresolved
parameters.description: Unresolved domains will be imported if set to true

actions.name: Import Observables
actions.description: Import observables into ThreatStream

parameters.name: observable_type
parameters.description: Type of observable to import, types supported by default: [ip, domain, url, email, hash]. Custom types can also be provided if they are available on ThreatStream instance

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Observable value

parameters.name: classification
parameters.description: Designate classification for observable

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: JSON formatted string of fields to include with the observable

parameters.name: create_on_cloud
parameters.description: Create on remote (cloud)? (applicable only for hybrid on-prem instances)

parameters.name: with_approval
parameters.description: Import the observable with approvals

parameters.name: allow_unresolved
parameters.description: Unresolved domains will be imported if set to true

actions.name: Tag Observable
actions.description: Add a tag to the observable

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Intelligence ID

parameters.name: source_user_id
parameters.description: ID of user to associate with tag

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tags to associate with this Observable

parameters.name: tlp
parameters.description: TLP to assign to each tag

actions.name: Get Pcap
actions.description: Download pcap file of a sample submitted to the sandbox and add it to vault

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of report associated with the pcap to download

actions.name: Detonate File
actions.description: Detonate file in ThreatStream

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Which platform to run the detonation on - Ex: WINDOWS10x64. Default is 'WINDOWS7' which will run the detonation on 'WINDOWS7' platform

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: Vault id of file to be detonated

parameters.name: classification
parameters.description: Classification of the sandbox submission - private or public

parameters.name: use_premium_sandbox
parameters.description: Specify whether the premium sandbox should be used for detonation - true or false. If you want to use the Joe Sandbox service for detonation, set this attribute to true

parameters.name: use_vmray_sandbox
parameters.description: Specify whether the vmray sandbox should be used for detonation - true or false. If you want to use the VMRay sandbox service for detonation, set this attribute to true

parameters.name: vmray_max_jobs
parameters.description: Specify the number of detonations you want VMRay to perform for the submission

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: JSON formatted string of additional fields to be included in the detonate file action. e.g. {"file_has_password":"true","file_password":"abc123"}. Please check the API doc to find more information on other valid fields

actions.name: Detonate Url
actions.description: Detonate URL in ThreatStream

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Which platform to run the detonation on - Ex: WINDOWS10x64. Default is 'WINDOWS7' which will run the detonation on 'WINDOWS7' platform

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to be detonated

parameters.name: classification
parameters.description: Classification of the sandbox submission - private or public

parameters.name: use_premium_sandbox
parameters.description: Specify whether the premium sandbox should be used for detonation - true or false. If you want to use the Joe Sandbox service for detonation, set this attribute to true

parameters.name: use_vmray_sandbox
parameters.description: Specify whether the vmray sandbox should be used for detonation - true or false. If you want to use the VMRay sandbox service for detonation, set this attribute to true

parameters.name: vmray_max_jobs
parameters.description: Specify the number of detonations you want VMRay to perform for the submission

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: JSON formatted string of additional fields to be included in the detonate url action. e.g. {"import_indicators":"true","report_radio-notes":"Credential-Exposure,compromised_email"}. Please check the API doc to find more infomation on other valid fields

actions.name: Get Status
actions.description: Retrieve detonation status present in Threatstream

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.description: Endpoint given by Detonate File/URL (eg: /api/v1/submit/12345/)

actions.name: Get Report
actions.description: Retrieve detonation report present in Threatstream

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.description: Endpoint given by Detonate File/URL (eg: /api/v1/submit/141/report/)

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Callback action for the on_poll ingest functionality

parameters.name: container_id
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of container records (incidents) to query for

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

actions.name: Run Query
actions.description: Run observables query in ThreatStream

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search string in JSON format using the Anomali filter language (as seen on the advanced search page)

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Field by which the query results will be ordered

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Record offset (used with paging, when returning many results)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Record limit

actions.name: List Import Sessions
actions.description: List all the import sessions

parameters.name: date_modified_gte
parameters.description: Import sessions with greater than or equal to the provided modified date will be returned

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Total number of import sessions to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Record offset (used with paging, when returning many results)

parameters.name: status_in
parameters.description: Status to filter the records

actions.name: Update Import Session
actions.description: This action updates the fields of the provided item id

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: ID of the import session to update

parameters.name: ph
parameters.description: Placeholder to be updated

parameters.name: intelligence_source
parameters.description: Intelligence Source to update

parameters.name: tlp
parameters.description: Traffic Light Protocol value to update

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tags to update

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment to update

parameters.name: expire_time
parameters.description: Expiration time to update (Format : YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM[:ss[.uuuuuu]][TZ])

parameters.name: threat_model_type
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of threat model types to associate

parameters.name: threat_model_to_associate
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of threat model IDs to associate

actions.name: List Threat Models
actions.description: List all the threat models

parameters.name: modified_ts__gte
parameters.description: Threat models with greater than or equal to the provided modified time stamp will be returned

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Total number of threat models to return

parameters.name: model_type
parameters.description: Model type to filter the records

parameters.name: tags_name
parameters.description: Tag name to filter the records

parameters.name: publication_status
parameters.description: Publication status to filter the records

actions.name: Create Threat Bulletin
actions.description: Create a threat bulletin in ThreatStream

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name to give the threat bulletin

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status to give the threat bulletin

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Source of the threat bulletin

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tags for the threat bulletin

parameters.name: tlp
parameters.description: Tlp to give the threat bulletin

parameters.name: assignee_user_id
parameters.description: Assignee to give the threat bulletin

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Body content to give the threat bulletin

parameters.name: body_content_type
parameters.description: Body content type to give the threat bulletin (Once specified, body_content_type cannot be modified, Default is 'markdown')

parameters.name: comments
parameters.description: Comments to give the threat bulletin(JSON format containing body, title, etc.)

parameters.name: attachments
parameters.description: Vault id of an attachment to add on the threat bulletin

parameters.name: local_intelligence
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of local intelligence IDs to associate with the threat bulletin - Note that this appends

parameters.name: cloud_intelligence
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of remote intelligence IDs to associate with the threat bulletin - Note that this appends

parameters.name: circles
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of circles to give the threat bulletin (Applicable only when a cloud threat bulletin will be created)

parameters.name: import_sessions
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sessions to give the threat bulletin

parameters.name: create_on_cloud
parameters.description: Create on remote (cloud)? (applicable only for hybrid on-prem instances)

parameters.name: is_public
parameters.description: Classification designation

parameters.name: is_anonymous
parameters.description: Whether the threat bulletin user and organization information is anonymized

parameters.name: tlp

parameters.name: assignee_user_id
parameters.description: Assignee to give the threat bulletin

parameters.description: Body content to give the threat bulletin

parameters.name: comments

parameters.name: local_intelligence
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of local intelligence IDs to associate with the threat bulletin - Note that this appends

parameters.name: cloud_intelligence
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of remote intelligence IDs to associate with the threat bulletin - Note that this appends

parameters.name: attachments
parameters.description: Vault id of an attachment to add on the threat bulletin

parameters.name: circles
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of circles to give the threat bulletin (Applicable only when a cloud threat bulletin will be updated)

parameters.name: import_sessions
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sessions to give the threat bulletin

parameters.name: is_public
parameters.description: Classification designation

parameters.name: is_anonymous
parameters.description: Whether the threat bulletin user and organization information is anonymized

actions.name: Add Association
actions.description: Create associations between threat model entities on the ThreatStream platform

parameters.name: entity_type
parameters.description: The type of the threat model entity on which want to add the association

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: The ID of the threat model entity on which want to add the association

parameters.name: associated_entity_type
parameters.description: The type of threat model entity which will associate the initial entity

parameters.name: ph
parameters.description: Placeholder to be updated

parameters.name: local_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of local entity IDs to associate with the entity (this will appends on the existing)

parameters.name: remote_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of remote enitity IDs to associate with the entity (this will appends on the existing)

actions.name: Remove Association
actions.description: Remove associations between threat model entities on the ThreatStream platform

parameters.description: Type of threat model entity from which you are removing the association

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: ID of the threat model entity from which you are removing the association

parameters.name: associated_entity_type
parameters.description: Type of threat model entity with which you are associating the initial entity

parameters.name: ph
parameters.description: Placeholder to be updated

parameters.name: local_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of local enitity IDs to associate with the entity - Note that this appends

parameters.name: remote_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of remote enitity IDs to associate with the entity - Note that this appends
